description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a fit build, standing upright with arms slightly extended at his sides. He is dressed in a casual, short-sleeved crew-neck t-shirt with a small logo on the left chest and a larger 'READY PLAYER ME' print on the back. He wears slim-fit pants that reach just above the ankles and a pair of low-top sneakers. His hair is styled in a short, neat undercut with a small bun at the back. The figure's facial features are neutral, and his overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for an urban environment. The clothing and accessories suggest a relaxed, everyday style typical of city dwellers.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a short-sleeved t-shirt, slim-fit pants, sneakers, and a neat undercut bun hairstyle, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view shows the t-shirt logo on the left chest, facial features, and the full front of the outfit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bun hairstyle, and the side seam of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'READY PLAYER ME' print on the back of the t-shirt and the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the bun, with the right arm and leg visible.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved t-shirt and slim-fit pants
attribute_hairstyle: short undercut with a small bun
